prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为约2093名、2088名、2121名、1913名、2483名。2021–2024年位次基本稳定在1900–2100区间，2025年出现明显后移，较 2024年下降约570名，基准位次约2483名；2021–2025年该校在海南省综合类招生计划分别为14人、16人、16人、16人、17人，整体呈小幅扩招趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，近年排名稳定在33–36名区间，属于全国顶尖的理工 类211高校；2026年高考周期内学校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及国家卫健委通报的伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文事件，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制。抖音热度 总排名第1（高热），2024年因毕业典礼撑伞视频获得极高曝光，但2025年后热度有所回落。历史投档异常记录中未见该校明显断档信号；冶金工程A+、材料科 学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科。材料科学与工程为该校王牌专业，与招生专业中的材料科学与工程直接对应；计算机类、自动化类等热门 专业虽未直接参评A类，但依托学校工科优势，培养质量较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，报考竞争激烈；材料科学与工程（属 生化环材大类）社会热度明显劝退，可能拉低相关专业组位次。海南省2026年高考报名人数约78000人，较2025年67408人增加约10600人（+15.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争显 著加剧。；北京科技大学位于北京市，属于跨省招生。该校在海南省招生计划占比较小 （约0.7%–0.9%），地域偏好因素影响有限。

- 计算机类
- 自动化类
- 大数据管理与应用（大数据与金融试验班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类
- 材料科学与工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2136–2890名内，建议以二档的材料科学与工程（学科A+但热度低，性价比高）为主力填报，一档的计算机类、自动化类作为冲刺，三档的工商管理类作为保底。 位次明显优于区间下限（<2136名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Hainan Province Comprehensive category were approximately 2093, 2088, 2121, 1913, and 2483 respectively. Rankings from 2021 to 2024 were basically stable in the 1900–2100 range, but in 2025 there was a significant backward shift, dropping about 570 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 2483. From 2021 to 2025, the university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province Comprehensive category was 14, 16, 16, 16, and 17 students respectively, showing a slight expansion trend overall.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 33–36 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the National Health Commission's report on forged transcripts and plagiarized degree theses, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 1st overall (high heat), with extremely high exposure in 2024 due to the graduation ceremony umbrella video, but popularity has declined after 2025. No obvious signal of a significant drop in historical admission records. Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, a total of 4 A- and above disciplines. Materials Science and Engineering is the university's flagship major, directly corresponding to the Materials Science and Engineering major in the enrollment list. Popular majors such as Computer Class and Automation Class, although not directly evaluated as A-class, rely on the university's engineering advantages and have high training quality.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Class and Electronic Information/Communication majors have high social popularity and are highly recommended, with fierce competition for applications. Materials Science and Engineering (belonging to the biology, chemistry, environment, materials category) has obvious social discouragement, which may lower the rankings of related major groups. In 2026, the number of college entrance examination registrants in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of about 10,600 (+15.7%) compared to 67,408 in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of candidates and intensified competition. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, belonging to cross-province enrollment. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province accounts for a small proportion (about 0.7%–0.9%), so the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The predicted minimum ranking is about 2513, with a range of 2136–2890.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Class
- Automation Class
- Big Data Management and Application (Big Data and Finance Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Class
- Materials Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration Class (Digital Intelligence Management Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2136–2890, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2's Materials Science and Engineering (A+ discipline but low popularity, high cost-performance) as the main choice, Tier 1's Computer Class and Automation Class as a sprint, and Tier 3's Business Administration Class as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2136), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1's flagship majors.
